en_title: Do You Use Your PS5 to Watch 4K Blu-ray Discs?
cn_title: 你现在还会用PS5看4K蓝光电影吗？
subtitle: 光驱也有副业
opus_summary: 索尼计划2028年停止生产实体游戏光盘，PS6大概率不会内置光驱。作者想知道，仍收藏4K蓝光电影和剧集的IGN读者，有多少其实正在用PS5观看这些实体影像。

paragraphs.en: With the recent news that Sony is going to end production of physical discs in 2028 , gamers are bracing for an all-digital future. And with an all-digital future, it's almost certain that the upcoming PS6 console won't include any sort of disc drive built in.
paragraphs.cn: 随着最近传出索尼将在2028年停止生产实体光盘的消息，玩家正在为一个全数字未来做准备。而在全数字未来中，接下来的PS6主机几乎可以肯定不会内置任何形式的光驱。

paragraphs.en: That's obviously devastating for any PlayStation gamers who like to own real copies of their games, but it's also potentially bad for another physical media industry: Movies. The PlayStation 5 is one of the best entry-level Blu-ray players for watching 4K movies these days.
paragraphs.cn: 这对喜欢真正拥有游戏实体拷贝的PlayStation玩家来说显然是毁灭性消息，但它也可能对另一个实体媒介行业不利：电影。如今，PlayStation 5是观看4K电影时最好的入门级蓝光播放器之一。

paragraphs.en: Here at IGN, we cover 4K Blu-ray releases pretty regularly. What I'd like to find out is just how much of our audience that cares about collecting physical movies and shows is actually using their PS5 to watch them?
paragraphs.cn: 在IGN，我们相当定期地报道4K蓝光发行。我想弄清楚的是，在关心收藏实体电影和剧集的受众里，到底有多少人实际上是在用自己的PS5观看这些内容？

paragraphs.en: The PlayStation news isn't going to have any sort of direct impact on the Blu-ray industry any time soon, of course. According a fairly recent sales report , the 4K Blu-ray category specifically saw growth in 2025 for the first time in years. And all of the people who already own a PS5 with a disc drive to watch movies aren't going to lose access to anything.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，PlayStation的这条消息短期内不会对蓝光行业造成任何直接影响。根据一份较新的销售报告，4K蓝光这个品类在2025年迎来了多年来首次增长。而所有已经拥有带光驱PS5、用它看电影的人，也不会失去任何访问权限。

paragraphs.en: What could affect the industry is what happens after the PS6 arrives years from now with no way of playing any sort of physical media. Sony isn't just in the video game space, they are also one of the biggest producers and distributors of Blu-rays in general. If the company is looking to move away from producing physical discs for games, movies and shows could be the next step.
paragraphs.cn: 真正可能影响这个行业的，是多年后PS6到来，却无法播放任何实体媒介时会发生什么。索尼并不只是电子游戏领域的公司，它也是整体蓝光产品最大的生产商和发行商之一。如果这家公司正准备离开游戏实体光盘生产，那么电影和剧集可能就是下一步。

paragraphs.en: What I mostly want to know is just how many IGN readers are currently relying on their PS5 to watch the 4K movies they buy. If most people are relying on their console to access this part of their media collection, what does that mean for the future? Please let us know what you think in the comments .
paragraphs.cn: 我最想知道的是，目前到底有多少IGN读者正在依靠PS5观看自己购买的4K电影。如果大多数人都依靠主机访问这部分媒体收藏，那对未来意味着什么？请在评论中告诉我们你的看法。
